description_long: This is a single, high-ankle hiking boot in a dusty tan color, featuring a rugged and supportive design. The upper is constructed from a combination of suede leather and synthetic mesh, with reinforced stitching and multiple eyelets for secure lacing. The boot has a padded collar and tongue for comfort, and a pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The midsole and outsole are made from durable rubber, with a visible tread pattern designed for traction on rough terrain. Signs of dirt and creasing are present, indicating regular outdoor use. The overall build suggests durability and protection for the wearer in urban or natural environments.
description: A tan, high-ankle hiking boot with rugged construction, padded collar, and visible signs of wear. Features include reinforced stitching, secure lacing, and a durable rubber sole.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the lacing system, padded tongue, and toe box with visible creases and dirt.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the padded collar, heel pull tab, and side stitching details.
description_view_2: Rear-right view focusing on the heel, pull tab, and the curve of the ankle support.
description_view_3: Front-right view displaying the lacing, toe area, and the rugged side panel design.
